# v0.1.4

## Changed

- **Renamed the item to "Capture Net."** It was "Animal Capture Net," but it also catches villagers, allays, and other non-animal mobs — so the name now matches what it does. This is a display-name change only: the item id, recipe, and any nets already in your world are unchanged, so saves and other mods are unaffected.
- The empty-net tooltip now reads "right-click a mob to capture" (was "an animal").

## Internal

- Loader-agnostic code (the item logic, captured-entity component, tooltip adapters, and capture-filter tags) now lives in one shared `common` source set compiled into both the Fabric and NeoForge jars, replacing the previous duplicated copy per loader. A standalone vanilla-only compile of `common` fails the build if platform-specific code ever leaks into the shared layer.
- Added the GitHub issue-tracker URL to the Fabric mod metadata, matching NeoForge.
